Senior Backend Engineer — Data Platform
NeuralPipe Inc.

We're building a real-time data platform that powers both transactional workflows and
ML inference pipelines. We're looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who is strong in
Python and distributed systems.

Must-Have
- 4+ years of Python backend development
- Experience with Kafka or similar event streaming systems
- PostgreSQL at scale

Nice-to-Have (NOT required — backend focus is the priority)
- Familiarity with ML frameworks such as PyTorch or TensorFlow
- Experience integrating ML model serving into data pipelines
- MLflow or similar experiment tracking

We do not expect our backend engineers to train models. The ML nice-to-haves are only
relevant if you happen to have them — strong backend fundamentals are what matters.
